channel.title: Thoughts from Daniel P.
channel.description: Recent content on Thoughts from Daniel P.

item.title: Prevention on my mind
item.description: Hi, I’m Dan. I’m a pediatric resident at Riley Hospital for Children. I spent the month of June in our intensive care unit, which was a humbling experience in a few different ways. First in terms of how much medicine I still needed to learn after 6+ years of education/training. Also in terms of witnessing the awesome power we healthcare providers have to sustain patients’ lives. But finally, how limited we are to alter the overall life course of most children.
